claim: The YOLO demand router schema already implements blocking logic that prevents PRD readiness when evidence agents report missing, clarify, block, or failed status.

evidence.summary: evidenceResultBlockingIssues function checks agent recommendation, verdict, status, missing, and error_code fields and returns blockers array
evidence.why: Core blocking logic that converts negative agent states into PRD readiness blockers.

evidence.summary: If result.missing has actionable items, blocker with code EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING is added
evidence.why: Specific handling of missing field that creates blockers when unresolved evidence exists.

evidence.summary: If recommendation is clarify/blocked/block or verdict is blocked/fail or status is blocked/failed/error, a blocker is added
evidence.why: Comprehensive status field checking that creates blockers for negative agent recommendations.

evidence.summary: Router iterates through required evidence agent roles, calls evidenceResultBlockingIssues for each result, and adds all returned blockers to the blockerList
evidence.why: Integration point where evidence agent blocking issues are collected and added to PRD readiness blockers.

evidence.summary: prd_ready is computed as blockers.length === 0 in inspectDemandPrdReadiness return statement
evidence.why: Final determination that any blocker including evidence agent blockers prevents PRD readiness.

evidence.summary: Test case 'evidence agent missing data and clarify recommendations block PRD readiness' verifies prd_ready is false and both EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING and EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED blockers exist
evidence.why: Executable test specification proving missing/clarify recommendations actually become blockers that prevent PRD readiness.

evidence.summary: inspectDemandPrdReadiness orchestrates the entire PRD readiness check including evidence agent result processing
evidence.why: High-level function that coordinates all blocking logic including evidence agent checks.

risks: If this claim is wrong, the system might allow incomplete evidence to produce PRD-ready status, violating the evidence-based readiness contract.

result.notes: Independent verification confirms the explorer's claim. The evidenceResultBlockingIssues function (481-511) checks recommendation, verdict, status, missing, and error_code fields. Lines 496-502 add blockers for actionable missing items. Lines 503-509 add blockers for negative recommendations (clarify/blocked/block) or verdicts (blocked/fail) or statuses (blocked/failed/error). Lines 709-727 integrate these checks by calling evidenceResultBlockingIssues for each evidence agent result and adding all returned issues to the blocker list. Line 740 computes prd_ready as blockers.length === 0, ensuring any evidence agent blocker prevents PRD readiness. Test at 246-286 confirms this behavior with missing data and clarify recommendations. The demand is already satisfied by existing implementation.
